Job Title: Senior FP&A Analyst | Private Equity / Technology | $150,000
Ad Text:
Private Equity backed SaaS / Technology Business
Hands on role across FP&A, financial modelling and commercial analysis
Impressive leadership team | $140,000 to $150,000 + Bonus

The Opportunity
Our client is a high growth, Private Equity backed technology business with a strong market position and continued global expansion. The business operates in a highly commercial and performance driven environment, with ongoing investment in the finance function to support strategic decision making.

They are seeking a Senior FP&A Analyst to join a high calibre team. This is a high impact role, working closely with senior leadership to deliver financial insights that shape performance, investment decisions and overall growth strategy.

The Challenge
Reporting to the Head of FP&A and working closely with senior leadership, your responsibilities will include:

Lead the monthly reporting cycle, including preparation of board packs, performance analysis and executive insights
Support and progressively take ownership of the group budgeting and forecasting processes
Develop and maintain financial models to support planning, scenario analysis and business performance tracking
Partner with stakeholders across the business to support commercial decision making and drive financial outcomes
Analyse key business drivers including revenue, margin and cost performance
Support preparation of business cases, investment analysis and strategic initiatives
Contribute to M&A and broader corporate development activity
Identify opportunities to improve planning, reporting and overall financial processes
Present insights and recommendations to senior stakeholders in a clear and concise manner
The Expertise
To be considered for this opportunity, you will bring:

A degree in Finance, Accounting or a related discipline
CA or CPA qualification, or working towards completion
3 to 6 years’ experience in FP&A, commercial finance or a similar environment
Strong capability across budgeting, forecasting and financial analysis
Strong financial modelling skills and advanced Excel capability
Exposure to Power BI or similar tools viewed favourably
A commercial mindset with strong stakeholder engagement capability
Experience within a Private Equity backed business or Big 4 / leading mid tier Deals, Transactions or Corporate Finance teams will be highly regarded
The Next Step
If this position will enhance your career and you would like further details on the client, the role, remuneration or a copy of the position description, please contact Lachlan Kiel for a confidential discussion on 0477 574 366.
Or alternatively please apply per the link below.

About ThompsonCook
  
At ThompsonCook we develop strong relationships with top accounting and finance professionals across Australia. We specialise in recruiting for key finance function roles including:

Chief Financial Officers, Treasury, Tax & Audit Leaders
Finance Managers & Financial Controller
Financial & Management Accountants
Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Payroll
We support our clients with both permanent and contracting recruitment solutions, ensuring they secure the best finance talent in the market.
